evals.prompt: Use $deep-code-review to review this workflow-kit branch before PR.
evals.expected_output: A read-only review report following docs/engineering/codex-github-code-review.md with a workflow trace, verified serious findings, optional non-blocking P2/P3 notes, and no file edits.
assertions: Determines the PR/base branch before using a merge base, or asks for the base if it cannot be determined
Reports the target, base, routed sources, subagent use, finder/verifier/sweep passes, and skipped-pass reasons
Consults the lessons ledger for known recurring patterns without duplicating its lesson list
Keeps any P2/P3 observations in a separate non-blocking notes section
Does not apply fixes or mutate repository files

evals.prompt: Use $deep-code-review on PR #123 and post comments for confirmed P1 findings.
evals.expected_output: A review flow that confirms the PR head before posting inline comments and a summary review, and does not approve, request changes, push, or fix code.
assertions: Posting comments is allowed only because the prompt explicitly requests it
Confirms the current PR head before posting
Posts inline comments and a summary review
Does not post P2/P3 notes unless explicitly requested
Does not include or offer a fix mode
